ads.author: Douglas Williams
ads.title: Arcade PCB Lot (16+ Boards) - Untested As-Is / Parts & Repair - Local Pickup 32246
ads.description: Selling a large, diverse collection of vintage arcade printed circuit boards (PCBs) as a single wholesale lot. Perfect for arcade restorers, hobbyists, or bench techs looking for winter projects, repair candidates, or valuable donor parts. $650 (OBO) Condition & Status: All boards are being sold strictly in unknown/untested condition, as-is, for parts or repair. They have not been bench-tested, and I cannot verify functionality. Please inspect the photos closely for board layouts, chip presence, and physical condition. What is included in the lot: • Zaxxon (Sega) • Ms. Pac-Man set • Super Pac-Man • 1942 (Capcom) • Choplifter • Mega Zone (Konami) • Double Dribble (Konami) • Sega G-80 Hardware System: • Sega G-80 Space Odyssey • Sega Astro Blaster (Sound PCB) • Shooters & Niche Titles: • Sky Soldiers • Zoar (Taito) • Birdie King (2 full board sets) • Taito Big Event Golf (w/ harness) • Champion Baseball • Champion Wrestler • Bally Senate boards Terms of Sale: • Local Pickup Only: Located in Jacksonville, FL (Zip Code 32246). • Sold as a Lot Only: I am not looking to split this collection up or sell individual boards at this time. • No Returns / No Guarantees: Due to the nature of vintage arcade electronics and the unknown functional status, all sales are final. *Cash or Venmo at pickup. Message me with any questions or to schedule a pickup time! Arcade, Arcade PCB, Jamma, Sega, Taito, Pacman, Retro Gaming, Coin op, Vintage Electronics, Capcom, Konami

ads.title: Vintage Coin-Operated Pinball Bagatelle Machine
ads.description: Vintage coin-operated pinball machine has a wooden cabinet with a black finish and a glass-covered playfield. This bagatelle-style game includes four detachable wooden legs with metal levelers. The playfield features metal pins, scoring cups, and a spring-loaded plunger mechanism. A coin slot is located on the front panel.

ads.description: Fully tested and working. Golden Tee Tournament Edition arcade machine by Incredible Technologies. Original full-size arcade cabinet with trackball controls, coin door, CRT monitor, and game board still installed. Cabinet appears largely complete but has been in storage and is being sold as-is, untested. Features: Original Golden Tee Tournament Edition artwork Full-size stand-up arcade cabinet Trackball control panel Coin door and coin mechanisms present CRT monitor installed Original game board appears present inside cabinet Great restoration project or man-cave/game room piece Condition: Fully functional Cabinet has cosmetic wear, chips, and scratches

ads.title: Atari Hard Drivin upright project working needs cabinet repair no trades
ads.description: This is a project I am willing to pass on to anyone who wants to restore it. Monitor chassis recapped the tube is original with burn in on screen text and gauges only the text is noticeable during gameplay. The bad the base of the seat and cabinet need repaired or replacing so listing as a project that works and plays the switch on third gear is flaky so currently disabled in settings. No back door or monitor door on the top. No trades.
